Appearances:
Plaintiff Phil Pohl is present.
Attorney Aaron Aleksandr for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ahmed Sowadah is present.
Attorney Jeffrey Koo appearing for defendant in limited scope.
Arabic Court Interpreter Hany Farag is present.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of May 1, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
